---
title: "Teaching"
---

# Intro to R - Universität Potsdam
Short intro course on base R for the class "Introduction to Statistics" (taught by Prof. Dr. Vasishth) in the WiSe 2018. For the homework, remember to "download linked file"" in order to download the R notebook. 

- [Lecture 1](IntroStats1.html) and [Homework 1](Homework1.Rmd)
- Lecture 2 and Homework 2
